info.name: Board Third Party Library API (Contract Tests)
info.description: Contract-first API definition for the Board Third Party Library. This initial slice defines service metadata and health endpoints.

request.description: Returns basic service metadata and advertised health endpoints.

response.name: API metadata returned successfully.

exec: pm.test("Liveness checks array is present", function () {

request.description: Indicates whether the API process is running. Does not check downstream dependencies.

response.name: API process is alive.

exec: pm.test("Status code matches expected readiness response", function () {
var postgresCheck = checks.find(function (c) { return c && c.name === "postgres"; });
pm.test("Postgres data matches expected database and user", function () {
pm.test("Postgres check is not healthy when readiness is not healthy", function () {

header.value: API is ready and dependencies are healthy.

request.description: Indicates whether the API is ready to serve requests, including downstream dependency checks (currently PostgreSQL connectivity).

response.name: API is ready and dependencies are healthy.
API is running but not ready due to dependency failure.

item.name: Login with email and password (Invalid credentials 401 example)

exec: pm.test("Expected problem code is invalid_credentials", function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql("invalid_credentials"); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(401); });

request.description: Mock-only request that forces the invalid-credentials (401) example for login.

item.name: Refresh authentication tokens (Invalid refresh token 401 example)

exec: pm.test("Expected problem code is invalid_refresh_token", function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql("invalid_refresh_token"); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(401); });

header.value: Refresh token is invalid, expired, or revoked.

request.description: Mock-only request that forces the invalid-refresh-token (401) example for refresh.

item.name: Reset password with verification token (Invalid reset token 409 example)

exec: pm.test("Expected problem code is password_reset_token_invalid", function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql("password_reset_token_invalid"); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(409); });

header.value: Reset token is invalid, expired, or already used.

request.description: Mock-only request that forces the invalid password reset token (409) example.

exec: pm.test("Expected problem code is invalid_current_password", function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql("invalid_current_password"); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(409); });

request.description: Mock-only request that forces the invalid current password (409) example for change password.

exec: pm.test("Expected problem code is external_identity_already_linked", function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql("external_identity_already_linked"); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(409); });

header.value: External identity is already linked to another user or already linked to this user.

request.description: Mock-only request that forces the external-identity-already-linked (409) example.

item.name: Get linked Board profile (Not linked 404 example)

exec: pm.test("Expected problem code is board_profile_not_linked", function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql("board_profile_not_linked"); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(404); });

header.value: No Board profile is linked to the current user.

request.description: Mock-only request that forces the board-profile-not-linked (404) example.
